REGISTER.TITLE: Sign up

RESET_PASSWORD.INVALID_LINK: Invalid reset link. Please request a new one.
RESET_PASSWORD.SUCCESS: Password reset successfully. Redirecting to sign in...

VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_HINT: Sign in to receive a new verification email

ERRORS.EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: This email address is already in use

ERRORS.INVALID_VERIFICATION_TOKEN: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Try signing in again to receive a new email.
ERRORS.INVALID_RESET_TOKEN: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
ERRORS.FORGOT_PASSWORD_FALLBACK: An error occurred while requesting password reset
ERRORS.RESET_PASSWORD_FALLBACK: An error occurred while resetting your password
ERRORS.VERIFY_EMAIL_FALLBACK: An error occurred while verifying your email
